name: restaurant managers overseeing 5–15 staff members tool
description: For restaurant managers overseeing 5–15 staff members, inefficient onboarding causes high turnover rates. We simplify training processes instead of manual training sessions and outdated onboarding materials.
problem_solved: Inefficient onboarding and training processes for new restaurant staff.
features: feedback collection tool for new hires
